text: A golden retriever playing fetch in a sunny park with green grass.
A red sports car parked on a city street at night.
A bowl of fresh fruit including apples, bananas, and grapes.
A mountain landscape with snow-capped peaks and a clear blue sky.
A cat sleeping on a windowsill in warm afternoon sunlight.
A busy coffee shop with people working on laptops.
An open book on a wooden desk next to a cup of tea.
A sunset over the ocean with orange and purple clouds.
A bicycle leaning against a brick wall covered in ivy.
A plate of spaghetti with tomato sauce and fresh basil.
